auth_username_exists: This username is already in use. Choose a different one
auth_email_exists: This email address is already in use. Try another email or sign in instead
auth_identifier_exists: That username or email address is already in use
auth_admin_required: This action requires an administrator account
auth_request_source_untrusted: This request came from an untrusted source. Reopen the page and try again
auth_request_origin_untrusted: This request came from an untrusted origin. Refresh the page and try again
auth_request_referer_untrusted: This request came from an untrusted page. Return from a trusted page and try again
auth_request_source_missing: This request is missing source information and cannot continue
auth_session_user_mismatch: This session does not belong to the current account. Sign in again to continue
auth_csrf_cookie_missing: The CSRF cookie is missing. Refresh the page and try again
auth_csrf_header_missing: The X-CSRF-Token header is missing. Refresh the page and try again
auth_csrf_token_invalid: CSRF verification failed. Refresh the page and try again
auth_registration_disabled: Public registration is disabled on this system
auth_email_blocked: This email address is blocked by the local account policy
auth_email_not_allowlisted: This email address is not allowed by the local account policy
auth_mfa_flow_invalid: This MFA session is invalid. Please start over from the login page.
auth_mfa_flow_expired: This MFA session expired. Please sign in again.
auth_mfa_code_invalid: The code is incorrect. Check it and try again.
auth_mfa_attempts_exceeded: Too many incorrect MFA attempts. Sign in again
auth_mfa_factor_required: This account does not have MFA enabled. Set up MFA in your account settings.
auth_mfa_factor_already_exists: TOTP MFA is already enabled for this account
auth_mfa_recovery_code_used: This recovery code has already been used
auth_mfa_email_code_required: Request an email code before continuing.
auth_mfa_email_code_expired: This email code has expired. Request a new code.
auth_invitation_invalid: This invitation link is invalid or no longer available
auth_invitation_expired: This invitation has expired. Ask an administrator to send a new one
auth_invitation_accepted: This invitation has already been accepted
auth_token_expired: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue
auth_token_invalid: Your session could not be verified. Sign in again to continue
auth_token_missing: Your session needs to be refreshed. Sign in again if this keeps happening
auth_refresh_token_stale: Your session was refreshed in another tab. Refresh the page if this keeps happening
auth_refresh_token_reuse_detected: Your session was signed out for security. Sign in again to continue
auth_pending_activation: This account still needs email verification before it can be used.
auth_contact_verification_invalid: This verification link is no longer available. It may already have been used
auth_contact_verification_expired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one to continue
auth_passkey_login_disabled: Passkey login is currently disabled on this system

refresh_token_stale: Your session was refreshed in another tab. Refresh the page if this keeps happening
refresh_token_reuse_detected: Your session was signed out for security. Sign in again to continue
